name: mfe_learning
description: Repo to start my micro frontend learning

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "quotes,scheduling,flight-logs,invoicing,shell" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan" "npm start --workspace=packages/mfe-quotes" "npm start --workspace=packages/mfe-scheduling" "npm start --workspace=packages/mfe-flight-logs" "npm start --workspace=packages/mfe-invoicing" "npm start --workspace=packages/shell"
